zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)於1474年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，他的父親Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)35歲，母親Isabella Kirkpatrick33歲。他於1488年與Agnes Janet Douglas在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)于1474年出生在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯时，他的父亲Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)35岁，母亲Isabella Kirkpatrick33岁。他于1488年与Agnes Janet Douglas在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grierson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Kirkcudbrightshire): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier , a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ), + son. Compare Greer , with which some variation is evident among the early bearers, and compare Gregor and McGregor .

History: A Scottish family by the name of Grierson claim descent from Gilbert, a son of Malcolm MacGregor (died 1374), 11th Lord of MacGregor. Gilbert was known as both MacGregor and Gregorson. In 1400 he was granted lands by the Earl of March in the name Grierson. The numerous northern Irish bearers of the name Greer claim descent from this same Gilbert.

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) was born in 1474, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag), was 35 and his mother, Isabella Kirkpatrick, was 33. He married Agnes Janet Douglas in 1488, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) est né en 1474, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag), avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella Kirkpatrick, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Janet Douglas en 1488, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)が1474年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで生まれた時，父Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)は35歳，母Isabella Kirkpatrickは33歳であった。1488年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでAgnes Janet Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)(이)가 1474년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Kirkpatrick(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1488년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Agnes Janet Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) nasceu em 1474, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag), tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Kirkpatrick, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Janet Douglas em 1488, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Lagg, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Un: лаг, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) родился в 1474 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Kirkpatrick, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Janet Douglas в 1488 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
